message:
fix(fp-conformance): align FP-P2C-005 groupby_sum_order with pandas default sort (br-frankenpandas-g90b)

Fixture FP-P2C-005/groupby_sum_order_strict expected_series listed
the result index as [b, a] (input insertion order). pandas'
DataFrame.groupby('key').sum() — and the harness invocation — use
the default sort=True, so the actual output is alphabetically
sorted [a, b]. Aligns expected_series to [a, b] / [6.0, 4.0],
matching pandas-default behavior; sum-correctness check is
unchanged.

Also upgrades the bare assert!(report.is_green()) at the test site
to include the report payload in the panic message so future
fixture mismatches surface details without re-running with
--nocapture.

fp-conformance: packet_filter_runs_groupby_packet now passes 4/4
cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
